title: hymenophyllum myriocarpum var. endiviifolium
intro: Hymenophyllum myriocarpum var. endiviifolium, also known as the fern-like Hymenophyllum, is a variety of the Hymenophyllum myriocarpum species, a type of fern native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum myriocarpum var. endiviifolium include the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and crushing the leaves to make a tea or infusing them in oil to create a topical treatment.
